package.name: gate_bin_renderer_cpp
package.description: GPU/CPU gate-traversal binary-mask renderer (C++). Subscribes to the drone pose (PX4 vehicle_local_position + vehicle_attitude, or a mocap PoseStamped) and the gate pose (/vrpn_mocap/gate/pose), projects the gate through a pinhole camera model and publishes the binary mask as a sensor_msgs/Image (mono8, RViz-viewable) and an optional Float32MultiArray for a visual policy. Geometry is a faithful port of the dva-quad-jax gate_traversal_binary_mask rasterisers (1/2/4-cam x wireframe/filled/soft). Optional CUDA backend; CPU fallback (OpenMP). Builds on x86 (Humble) and Jetson Orin.
